endpoints.name: GET /{finorvin}/components
endpoints.description:
Returns URLs pointing to images in JPG format in the highest available resolution (depending on the component) of the vehicle's:
  * engine (1024x576 px), 
  * rim (710x710 px), 
  * trim (800x600 px), 
  * paints (800x600 px), 
  * upholstery (800x600 px) and 
  * equipments (740x416 px).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FINORVIN}} with a real finorvin.

endpoints.name: GET /{finorvin}/components/engine
endpoints.description: Returns a URL pointing to an image of the vehicles engine.  These images are available in the resolution 1024x576 px.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FINORVIN}} with a real finorvin.

endpoints.name: GET /{finorvin}/components/equipments
endpoints.description: Returns URLs pointing to images of this vehicle's equipments. The images are available in the highest possible resolution (usually 740x416 px).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FINORVIN}} with a real finorvin.

endpoints.name: GET /{finorvin}/components/paint
endpoints.description: Returns URLs pointing to images of this vehicles paint.  These images are available in resolution 800x600 px.  Note there might be two paints (e.g. Smart, 'paint' for body panel and 'paint2' for the tridion cell)
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FINORVIN}} with a real finorvin.

endpoints.name: GET /{finorvin}/components/rim
endpoints.description: Returns a URL pointing to an image of the vehicles rim.  These images are available in the resolution 710x710 px.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FINORVIN}} with a real finorvin.

endpoints.name: GET /{finorvin}/components/trim
endpoints.description: Returns a URL pointing to an image of this vehicles trim.  These images are available in resolution 800x600 px.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FINORVIN}} with a real finorvin.

endpoints.name: GET /{finorvin}/components/upholstery
endpoints.description: Returns URLs pointing to images of the vehicle's upholsteries. Tge images are available in the highest possible resolution (usually 800x600 px).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FINORVIN}} with a real finorvin.

endpoints.name: GET /{finorvin}/vehicle
endpoints.description: Returns URLs pointing to PNG images of a vehicle with a transparent background.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FINORVIN}} with a real finorvin.
